mapper.select: SELECT n.*, s.real_name AS publisher_name FROM notification n LEFT JOIN staff s ON n.publisher_id = s.id ORDER BY n.create_time DESC
SELECT n.*, s.real_name AS publisher_name FROM notification n LEFT JOIN staff s ON n.publisher_id = s.id WHERE n.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification (title, content, publisher_id) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{publisherId})
